subject: Investigate Trump's massive web of potential corruption
body:
Stand with Rep. Cummings: Investigate Trump's massive web of potential corruption (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

Petition to House Oversight Committee Chair Jason Chaffetz:
"Immediately investigate President-elect Donald Trump's financial arrangements to ensure he does not have any actual or perceived conflicts of interest and he and his advisors comply with all legal and regulatory ethical requirements when he assumes the presidency."

Add your name:

(http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

Donald Trump is a lifelong scam artist who has used his fame to swindle people out of their hard-earned money. Now, he appears to be planning to use the presidency of the United States to line his own pocket – putting all of us at risk.

No one knows the full extent of Trump's foreign financial and business entanglements because of his unprecedented secrecy and refusal to release his tax returns. Government ethics experts have already said Trump is poised to violate the Constitution by personally profiting from the presidency. On top of it all, we still do not know whether he is indebted to foreign interests that would give them influence over the commander in chief.1,2,3

For years, House Republicans spent millions investigating Sec. Hillary Clinton in what one Republican leader later admitted was an attempt to score partisan points.4 Now, Rep. Elijah Cummings is calling on the Republican chair of the House Oversight Committee to investigate the real, dangerous and growing potential corruption of a Trump presidency.

Stand with Rep. Cummings: Investigate Trump's massive web of potential corruption. Click here to sign the petition. (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

Trump's massive web of potential corruption is on a never-before-seen scale. Past presidents have sold assets and placed money and investments in blind trusts. Trump, by contrast, claims to be handing over his businesses to his children. But in the days since the election, he has continued pushing his own financial interests. Because he is still hiding the full extent of his business entanglements, we have no way of knowing if he is under the thumb of foreign interests, whether his business interests in the Middle East or other countries run counter to American foreign policy or whether he is merely using the presidency to enrich himself.5,6

Here are the examples of potential corruption that have emerged just since Nov. 8:7,8,9

Trump's children have a role in the presidential transition, despite claims that they will take over the Trump business from their father. Ivanka Trump attended a meeting with the Japanese prime minister and reportedly joined a phone call between her father and the president of Argentina. A long-stalled Trump project in Argentina mysteriously got the green light to move forward days after that phone call. Trump reportedly used his meeting with British politicians to push them to block offshore wind farms that he believes will sully the view from his Scotland golf courses. Indian real estate developers bragged about meeting with Trump post-election and expanding their work with him now that he has the power of the presidency. Trump paid $25 million to settle charges that he defrauded students of Trump University. News broke that immediately before the election Trump launched eight mysterious companies to build luxury real estate projects in Saudi Arabia. Foreign diplomats told The Washington Post that they would deliberately book rooms at Trump's Washington, D.C. hotel in order to curry favor with the president Government ethics experts who served under Republican and Democratic presidents have agreed that Trump's potential conflicts of interest might be unconstitutional The U.S. Secret Service might pay millions of dollars to rent two floors in Trump Tower to protect him and his family, with Trump pocketing the proceeds. Trump praised his Turkish business partner, who had butted heads with Turkey's government, in a phone call with autocratic Turkish President Erdogan.
Jason Chaffetz, the Republican chair of the House Oversight Committee, is no diehard Trump fan and once refused to endorse or defend him.8 After spending untold hours investigating Clinton's non-scandals, he owes it to the American public to investigate naked conflicts of interest emerging in the Trump administration. We need to help Rep. Cummings build the public pressure on Chaffetz to investigate potential conflicts of interest or outright corruption.

Stand with Rep. Cummings: Investigate Trump's massive web of potential corruption. Click here to sign the petition. (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

The greatest threat from Trump will continue to be persecution and the climate of hate directed at Muslims, the undocumented, people of color, immigrants, and women. It is becoming even clearer that Trump's strategy is to divide the American people and scapegoat these groups while enriching himself and his Wall Street friends. A true progressive response to the Trump regime will unconditionally resist his bigoted and racist policies while exposing the way he serves the powerful and privileged.

Because the president is not subject to federal conflict-of-interest laws, the House Oversight Committee plays a crucial role in standing up to Trump.9 Progressive champions like Sen. Elizabeth Warren have called for investigation, and with Rep. Elijah Cummings is already showing what determined leadership looks like, we need to stand with him.

Stand with Rep. Cummings: Investigate Trump's massive web of potential corruption. Click below to sign the petition:

http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/ (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_cummings_corruption_dems/)

Thank you for speaking out,

Murshed Zaheed, Political Director
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

body:
Donald Trump is tweeting again Democrats
---
**Standing up to Trump and the GOP starts right now. Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back -- and get your free sticker:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c322/4067b0a/2264743e3/7e074334/38265341/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Proudly-Voted1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161129_ew_nd&source=em_20161129_ew_nd")**
Friend --

On Sunday, Donald Trump tweeted something truly jaw-dropping about the outcome of this election:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c322/4067b0a/2264743e3/7e074335/38265341/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Proudly-Voted1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161129_ew_nd&source=em_20161129_ew_nd")
Donald has spent more time on Twitter than he has receiving intelligence briefings during the transition. And he's used his tweets to attack and insult anyone he perceives as opposing him, from _The New York Times_ to peaceful demonstrators outside his hotels.

But those "millions of people" who he falsely claims "voted illegally?" He's talking about you and me.

I'm proud to be one of the 64 million Americans who voted for Hillary Clinton this year, and I'm even prouder that more than 2 million more people chose her over Trump.

And I'll be damned if he's going to try to wipe away our votes -- and our Democratic principles and ideals -- with the push of a button.

If you're with me, then help Democrats keep standing up and fighting for what we believe in for the next four years. Chip in $3 or more right now -- we'll send you a free sticker so you can show off the values you voted for.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Donald vs. the First Amendment
body:
We're standing up to Trump Democrats
---
**Standing up to Trump and the GOP starts right now. Pitch in $3 or more before our end-of-month deadline to help Democrats fight back:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c332/4067b0a/226252cab/7e073357/3039863153/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161129_ew2_nd&source=em_20161129_ew2_nd")**
Friend --

In the wee hours of the night and into the morning, president-elect Donald Trump went on yet another Twitter crusade against a news outlet -- this time CNN.

This morning, in response to absolutely nothing, he started musing on the possibility of revoking citizenship as punishment for engaging in what the Supreme Court has ruled is protected free speech:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c332/4067b0a/226252cab/7e073354/3039863153/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161129_ew2_nd&source=em_20161129_ew2_nd")
Freedom of the press. Freedom of speech. Freedom of religion. Freedom of assembly. Before even taking office, Donald Trump has signaled his support for an all-out assault on our First Amendment rights.

If Trump thinks we're going to sit idly by while he belittles and attacks our constitutional liberties and threatens to undermine our democracy, he's got another thing coming.

Pitch in $3 or more before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, and let's show Trump and his GOP allies Democrats are united and ready to fight back.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c332/4067b0a/226252cab/7e073355/3039863153/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161129_ew2_nd&source=em_20161129_ew2_nd")**

subject: Tell Congress: Investigate Trump NOW

body:
We saw this coming, but that doesn't make it any less terrifying. The New York Times just exposed... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40c/22117239/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/investigate-trump?source=PT-20161129-UrgentDS-ProsHV")
---
_**New York Times: "Potential Conflicts Around the Globe for Trump"**_
[**ADD YOUR NAME: Call on Republicans to investigate Trump's dealings >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40c/22117239/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/investigate-trump?source=PT-20161129-UrgentDS-ProsHV")**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40f/22117239/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")** | [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40c/22117239/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/investigate-trump?source=PT-20161129-UrgentDS-ProsHV")
---

Friend -- We saw this coming, but that doesn't make it any less terrifying.

_The New York Times_ just exposed an UNPRECEDENTED web of looming business conflicts surrounding Trump's empire. **No one knows if he 'll put America's interests before his company's -- or if he'll use the presidency to line his pockets!**

And what's Trump's response to this unsettling news? Distract the media with absurd claims about "illegal votes" and rigged elections! SERIOUSLY?

[**ADD YOUR NAME: Demand a full and immediate inquiry into all of Trump 's potential conflicts of interest. We can't let him get away with this!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40c/22117239/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/investigate-trump?source=PT-20161129-UrgentDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A

This despicable move is classic Trump: When bad news hits, change the subject at any cost. **It worked on the campaign trail -- and it 'll work AGAIN if good people stand idly by.**

[**That 's why we need YOUR help to make sure he can't escape. Sign our petition and hold him accountable!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee70/2b07114c/43580845/737cb40c/22117239/VEsB/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/investigate-trump?source=PT-20161129-UrgentDS-ProsHV")

Team DSCC

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: We're just getting started
body:
If we are going to continue transforming American politics and reclaiming our democracy, we must stay engaged.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we launched Our Revolution less than 100 days ago, we set out to transform American politics, making our political and economic systems once again responsive to the needs of working families.
We have been working tirelessly to achieve this goal, a goal that does not change no matter who is in the White House.
In fact, it is now more important than ever that we continue our fight to achieve economic, social, racial and environmental justice. We must keep up the pressure to pass a $15 minimum wage, protect our environment against climate change, and get big money out of politics so billionaires cannot buy our elections.
[**Today, this Giving Tuesday, please make a $3 contribution to Our Revolution to recommit yourself to the fight to create a government that represents all of us, not just those at the top.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev-giving-tuesday?refcode=em161129-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev-giving-tuesday?refcode=em161129-full")
Our political revolution continues in states and communities across the country. If this election taught us anything, it's that the American people are fed up with the status quo. They want change.
If we are going to continue transforming American politics and reclaiming our democracy, we must stay engaged in the political process. The election may be over, but our work is just getting started.
[**Please help fuel the political revolution by making a $3 contribution to Our Revolution today, Giving Tuesday.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev-giving-tuesday?refcode=em161129-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrev-giving-tuesday?refcode=em161129-full")
Together, we are going to continue fighting for the progressive values we share. Together, we will show the political establishment that we are in it for the long haul.
Thank you for everything you've done, and will do, to help create a government that works for all of us.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director

clean_body: If we are going to continue transforming American politics and reclaiming our democracy, we must stay engaged. Sisters and Brothers - When we launched Our Revolution less than 100 days ago, we set out to transform American politics, making our political and economic systems once again responsive to the needs of working families. We have been working tirelessly to achieve this goal, a goal that does not change no matter who is in the White House. In fact, it is now more important than ever that we continue our fight to achieve economic, social, racial and environmental justice. We must keep up the pressure to pass a $15 minimum wage, protect our environment against climate change, and get big money out of politics so billionaires cannot buy our elections. "" Our political revolution continues in states and communities across the country. If this election taught us anything, it's that the American people are fed up with the status quo. They want change. If we are going to continue transforming American politics and reclaiming our democracy, we must stay engaged in the political process. The election may be over, but our work is just getting started. "" Together, we are going to continue fighting for the progressive values we share. name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Fight back against Trump's plans >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7624/24c69fd9/323354b/18ec335c/3625232799/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all&source=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all")
---

| | Peter,

Donald Trump released his plan for his first 100 days, and it's pretty scary for women and families.

He wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which 20 million Americans rely on for health care and has banned companies from charging women more for health care simply for being women.

He wants to appoint a new Supreme Court justice -- and he's already promised that his pick will support reversing _Roe v. Wade_.

He even wants to pass a childcare plan that only helps the wealthiest Americans.

This is just the beginning. That's why we need to start fighting back now.

**[Donate $3 to show Donald Trump that we won't stand for his attacks on women and families.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7624/24c69fd9/323354b/18ec335d/3625232799/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161128_email_100Days?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+show+Donald+Trump+that+we+wo&utm_campaign=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all&source=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all")**

If Trump repeals the ACA, women are going to have a tough time affording birth control. Preventive care may not be covered. And many families will lose insurance altogether.

As for Supreme Court justices, Trump's shortlist is terrifying. Take Judge William H. Pryor, Jr. He's called _Roe v. Wade_ "the worst abomination of constitutional law in our history." Imagine that guy being the ninth vote on the court.

Thankfully, our women will be in Congress to fight back, including four new senators and eight new congresswomen. And in two years, we'll send more women to join them.

**Donate $3 to help fight back against Donald Trump's attacks on women, families, and choice:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/100-Days-Plan](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7624/24c69fd9/323354b/18ec335e/3625232799/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161128_email_100Days?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg100DaysPlan&utm_campaign=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all&source=WPEFEW37N_digital_email_20161129_100days_n-all")**

Thank you,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: VanHollen.org
subject: unhinged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
For those wondering how long the President-elect could go without sounding completely unhinged, the answer unfortunately is in -- nineteen days. |
Friend,

For those wondering how long the President-elect could go without sounding completely unhinged, the answer unfortunately is in -- nineteen days.

President-elect Trump's ridiculous claim that there was massive voter fraud in the recent election and that he had actually won the popular vote is unsupported by any facts. This reckless and delusional conduct is not only un-presidential, it is downright scary. Our country -- and the world -- cannot afford to have a president that operates in conspiracy theories.

All Americans, regardless of whom they voted for, must unite to insist that the President-elect stop this reckless behavior and live in the real world of facts.

[**That 's why we're asking you to join Chris and commit to keeping Donald Trump accountable >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4d/70cdc2ba/473c8962/39781e5/2741327836/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/keep-donald-trump-accountable-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+asking+you+to+j&utm_campaign=em112916&source=em112916")

Friend, it has never been more important for each of us to stay engaged in local, state, and national issues.

We need to stand up for the values that we know will make this country stronger and expand opportunity for those who have suffered most in our economy. We need to push back against efforts to reward the billionaire class at the expense of everyone else, reduce access to healthcare, loosen gun safety laws, reverse environmental protections, target women's health, and undermine efforts to control the flood of secret campaign money.

You can count on Chris to lead the way. But this isn't a fight any of us can take on alone.

Please, add your name and let Chris know you are standing with him: [**http://action.vanhollen.org/takeaction**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4d/70cdc2ba/473c8962/39781e2/2741327836/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/takeaction?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorgtakeaction&utm_campaign=em112916&source=em112916")

Thank you for your commitment to building a better Maryland and a better America.

Team Van Hollen
---

---
